name: Easy Chicken Pot Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion in margarine until tender, then blend the soup, milk, and marjoram together.
2. Add the onion mixture to the bowl with the diced chicken and peas and carrots.
3. Pour the soup mixture over the ingredients in the casserole dish.
4. Top with biscuits made from Bisquik or your own recipe.
5. Bake for 20 minutes at 450°F.
